stack: Rust (axum 0.8 / tokio 1 full / dashmap) + React 19 / Vite / TanStack Query admin UI
summary: Zero external adoption surface. The approval engine, ApprovalManager, stream pause/resume, and admin/UI patterns already exist in-repo; the gaps close with in-tree tokio::time (already used in the same pipeline file), a DashMap iterate, an axum GET handler, and the existing React kit. Build-vs-adopt: BUILD (wire) for all three goals, zero new dependencies.

build_required.what: Add a TTL-deadline arm to the paused-stream select! (auto-DENY the held call on expiry, emit deny + resume to termination); a background purge_expired janitor; and an approval:{enabled,ttl_seconds} config block (enabled:false -> fail-closed deny).
reuses: middleware/pipeline.rs:815-833 (the paused-stream select! to add the sleep_until arm) + pipeline.rs:744 (tokio::time::interval watchdog pattern for the janitor)
authz/engine.rs:54 DEFAULT_APPROVAL_TTL_SECONDS; config/types.rs (add approval block, serde default)
build_required.priority: HIGH — closes a fail-open-to-hang defect; build first

build_required.what: ApprovalManager::list() -> Vec<ApprovalStatus> (iterate DashMap, skip expired); GET /approvals + GET /approvals/{id} admin endpoints; a new Approvals web tab (page + client fns + hooks + types) with a poll refresh and approve/deny buttons.
reuses: admin/mod.rs list-handler pattern (list_policies_handler / list_agent_identities_handler) + POST /approvals/{id}/decision already present
web/src/pages/AgentIdentities.tsx + Policies.tsx (page/table/modal + RQ hooks), App.tsx route+nav, admin.ts/useAdmin.ts/types.ts

build_required.what: Fix the stale 'RequireApproval is treated as a deny' comments (ag_ui.rs:245, a2ui.rs:140) to describe only the no-handle fallback; add a verification test that the flow pauses+resumes/denies end-to-end. In-band client decision channel is OUT of scope (follow-up).
reuses: stream/ag_ui.rs + stream/a2ui.rs request_approval/resolve_approval; middleware/pipeline.rs pause loop

in_tree_confirmations: tokio = features=["full"] (time present); already using tokio::time::interval (pipeline.rs:744), sleep (cache/mod.rs:386), timeout (main.rs:839) — the select! deadline arm for G3 is an in-tree pattern, zero new deps.
ApprovalManager stores expires_at as a monotonic Instant — reuse for the deadline, don't re-derive from wall clock.
ApprovalStatus is already Serialize — a list endpoint reuses it.
deferred_followups: Multi-replica: ApprovalManager is in-memory per-replica; cross-replica decision routing (shared store + sticky routing) is a documented single-replica constraint this phase, follow-up later.
In-band client decision channel (client-decides over the same stream) — larger stream-protocol change.
